failedAssertions.reason: Multi-room stitching (P1): No explicit room transition handling or incremental map expansion code. ARKit provides implicit spatial continuity within a single session but there is no dedicated multi-room stitching logic. The pipeline processes all accumulated vertices at once after Done Scanning, which does produce a single floor plan spanning all scanned areas, but lacks explicit room-to-room transition detection or map expansion.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance: Phase 2 iOS section with testing approach, key source files, assertion-to-file mapping, and isolation rules
